title: Blocks Galore
description: This mod adds a variety of building blocks to Minecraft
body:
![Blocks Galore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06ace66bb18e31812a0102a9cf276618343718cd.png)
Blokcs Galore adds a variety of new blocks to the game to enhance the building aspects of Minecraft. The new additions included in this mod enhance the building ecperience by addimg additional blocks to use! 

**Some new blocks include:** _Ruby Block set, Additional Stone Vairents, Additional Calcite Varients, Additional Obsidian Varients, and much more to come._

Blocks Galore will continue to be updated to updated versions of Minecraft for foreseeable future, A forge port is currently being considered!

Feel Free To Use This Mod In Modpacks with proper creddits 


**Have fun building with Blocks Galore!**
